strengths: ~16 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive and long-term ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the scale a Principal role requires
Title trajectory is Senior/Staff IC; no evidence of director-level influence, strategic advisory, or executive-facing work
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage; no deep cloud-platform strategy or architecture footprint

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
No director-level IC or strategic advisory track record

response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and the ability to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption. The résumé shows a strong hands-on engineer with ~16 years of experience and recent MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq, but no shipped AI products, no published AI research, no cloud-platform strategy footprint, and no evidence of advising executives or external partners. Founder experience at GISCollective partially addresses the entrepreneurial preference, but the AI-leadership and strategic-influence bar central to this Principal role is not met by the evidence presented.
